Class CountryPath

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.shape.Shape
javafx.scene.shape.SVGPath
View.CountryPath
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CountryPath extends javafx.scene.shape.SVGPath
